main.c(3) Library Functions Manual main.c(3)

NAME

main.c

SYNOPSIS

Functions


int acds_main (void)
ACDS (discovery-service mode) entry point.

Function Documentation

int acds_main (void )

ACDS (discovery-service mode) entry point. Expects options already parsed and shared initialization complete. Called by main.c mode dispatcher after options_init() and asciichat_shared_init().

Returns

Exit code (0 = success, non-zero = error)

Definition at line 266 of file discovery-service/main.c.

266                     {
267   session_server_like_config_t config = {
268       // Required callbacks
269       .init_fn = acds_init_fn,
270       .init_user_data = NULL,
271       .interrupt_fn = acds_interrupt_fn,
272 
273       // Cleanup
274       .cleanup_fn = acds_cleanup_fn,
275       .cleanup_user_data = NULL,
276 
277       // No status screen for ACDS (for now)
278       .status_fn = NULL,
279       .status_user_data = NULL,
280 
281       // TCP handler
282       .tcp_handler = acds_client_handler,
283       .tcp_user_data = &g_server,
284 
285       // WebSocket
286       .websocket =
287           {
288               .enabled = true,
289               .handler = acds_websocket_client_handler,
290               .user_data = &g_server,
291           },
292 
293       // mDNS
294       .mdns =
295           {
296               .enabled = true,
297               .service_name = "ascii-chat-Discovery-Service",
298               .service_type = "_ascii-chat-discovery-service._tcp",
299           },
300 
301       // UPnP
302       .upnp =
303           {
304               .enabled = true,
305               .description = "ascii-chat ACDS",
306           },
307 
308       // System
309       .raise_fd_limit = true,
310       .fd_limit_target = 65536,
311   };
312 
313   return session_server_like_run(&config);
314 }




References acds_client_handler(),
    acds_websocket_client_handler(), and
    session_server_like_run().
